messages.author: Mix Engineer
messages.text:
Hey FlowKing — welcome to the Executive Bundle! We're excited to work with you this year.

We've sent your onboarding form and custom beat brief to your email. Please complete and return both within 24–48 hours so we can lock in your creative direction and get started.

Your full catalog access is live now. Browse at mxstermxndsprods.store and just hit reply here with any beat requests.

messages.author: Jordan Davis
messages.text: Let's go! Just filled out the onboarding form and sent it back. The beat brief is almost done — will have it over within the hour. Already browsing the catalog, there's some serious heat in there.

messages.author: Mix Engineer
messages.text:
Got everything — onboarding form and beat brief both received. Your consultation is confirmed for May 15th at 2PM EST.

In the meantime, whenever you're ready to submit stems for Session 1, drop them in a Google Drive folder and reply here with the link.

messages.author: Mix Engineer
messages.text:
Session 1 is in the mix now. Stems received and organized — great separation on the vocals, this is going to be a strong one. Targeting delivery within 5 business days.

One note: the 808 on verse 2 is slightly clipping in your rough. We'll clean that up. No action needed from you.

messages.author: Jordan Davis
messages.text: Appreciate the heads up on the 808. Yes please fix that. Do I need to send anything else for Session 1 or are we good?

messages.author: Mix Engineer
messages.text: You're all good for Session 1 — we have everything we need. Draft coming your way within 5 business days.
